title: FORTUNE_DATA
description: The data contract an AI agent must satisfy to render a Yearn fortune card. Each card type (profile, daily, social) reads its own slice; the agent should populate all slices it intends to render.

name.description: Display name shown in the card footer, e.g. "Teri Shim".

profile.description: Data for the profile fortune card.

luckyNumber.description: The user's lucky number, displayed prominently.

luckyColor.description: Lucky color — a palette name or hex value. Palette names: orange, marigold, rose, magenta, violet, azure, teal, lime. Unrecognised values fall back to orange.

luckyStone.description: Lucky gemstone. Determines which SVG illustration is shown.

millionaireChance.description: Playful percentage chance of becoming a millionaire.

meetLoveAge.description: Age when the user will meet their love.

projection.description: A broad fortune reading paragraph, displayed in bold lowercase.
examples: a season of bold moves pays off — trust the momentum and let your instincts lead.

daily.description: Data for the daily reading card.

date.description: The date shown in the header, e.g. "may 22, 2026". Lowercase preferred.

avoid.description: The thing to avoid today, shown in a pill tag.

luck.description: Luck scores across four life categories. Each is an integer 0–5 rendered as a segmented meter.

social.description: Data for the social sharing card.

shareUrl.description: The URL encoded into the QR code for sharing.
